title: PPE deliveries (England): 16 November to 22 November 2020
body: "These experimental statistics about PPE items distributed for use by health and social care services in England include a breakdown of deliveries by PPE item.  The ‘Weekly PPE data’ attachment gives a more detailed breakdown of daily PPE deliveries from 25 February to 22 November 2020. "

taxons.title: Healthcare workers, carers and care settings during COVID-19
